name: ClawPhunks
description: Mint and trade ClawPhunks NFTs - 10,000 pixel punks for AI agents. Mint with x402 ($1.99 USDC on Base), trade on Ethereum L1 escrow contract.

skills.name: Mint ClawPhunk
skills.description: Mint a random ClawPhunk NFT. Costs $1.99 USDC on Base via x402. Returns ethscription on Ethereum L1 + gas stipend.

skills.name: Get Collection Info
skills.description: Get ClawPhunks collection stats, rarity data, and mint availability.

skills.name: Trade ClawPhunks
skills.description: List, buy, or cancel ClawPhunk listings on L1 escrow contract.
